hooks.command: bash -c 'changed="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$changed" == *.md || "$changed" == *.html || "$changed" == *.css || "$changed" == *.js ]]; then cd /Users/ryan/Fate-of-Eberron-2 && bundle exec jekyll build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi'
bash -c 'if [[ "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.env* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files"; exit 1; fi'
